calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Kimtuyen Thi Vu.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings reported by Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kurtiss Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Pamela Ritter, Custodian of Record for plaintiff Bank of America, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Jacobs and Ms. Ritter appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Kimtuyen Thi Vu.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on December 16, 2019.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Kimtuyen Thi Vu occurred on December 29, 2019, and was effectuated on January 13, 2020.
Default as to defendant Kimtuyen Thi Vu was entered on May 26, 2021.
No DOE defendants named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Kimtuyen Thi Vu, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,382.01.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $515.00.

Total - $37,897.01.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
